description:
## 1.0.0 (2026-07-06)

* enter PiP synchronously from watch activity ([d0fcea2](https://github.com/NekoGryphou/crunchyroll-pip-patches/commit/d0fcea2ae5f4007ede2157abb4938da15d26e804))
* enter PiP with Android framework APIs ([2b8f308](https://github.com/NekoGryphou/crunchyroll-pip-patches/commit/2b8f308156a39fc6fb73a90f9be19d4b892ef3ce))

### ✨ New Features

* add Crunchyroll Picture-in-Picture patch ([5323498](https://github.com/NekoGryphou/crunchyroll-pip-patches/commit/5323498148352c33f0e0f0950bebb4f5a9417ffa))
